creator: shuvaev@physik.uni-wuerzburg.de
text:
9-bytes cosmetic change in the upstream distfile.
I don't think it is necessary to change PORTREVISION.
The proposed change would break installations with already fetched
old version of stream.c (one would have to remove it by hand first).
However, the existent DIST_SUBDIR
structure is already complex enough and I don't want to introduce
any new sub-directories at this point (see the inlined diff
of the distfile below).

--- stream.c.orig       2009-09-15 16:46:26.000000000 +0200
+++ stream.c    2010-10-25 16:45:32.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 /*-----------------------------------------------------------------------*/
 /* Program: Stream                                                       */
-/* Revision: $Id: stream.c,v 5.9 2009/04/11 16:35:00 mccalpin Exp mccalpin $ */
+/* Revision: $Id: stream.c,v 5.9 2009/04/11 16:35:00 mccalpin Exp $ */
 /* Original code developed by John D. McCalpin                           */
 /* Programmers: John D. McCalpin                                         */
 /*              Joe R. Zagar                                             */

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
